name: convert-key
description: Convert a PEM private key between PKCS#8 (-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----) and PKCS#1 (-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----) formats using openssl, collapsing format detection, conversion, and verification into one step.

parameters.name: keyfile
parameters.description: Path to the PEM private key file

parameters.name: --to
parameters.description: Target format: pkcs1 or pkcs8 (default: auto-detect and flip to opposite)

parameters.name: --output
parameters.description: Write converted key to FILE instead of stdout

parameters.name: --in-place
parameters.description: Overwrite original file with converted key

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses format detection (head -1 + openssl check), conversion attempt (openssl pkey), and verification into one step, saving 4-5 agent steps per key conversion.
